task_completion.description: Locate the 'Staff Altercation' bookmark in the Nx Witness VMS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness VMS client is open, and a bookmark named 'Staff Altercation' is visible in the bookmarks panel, notification panel, or on the timeline.

task_completion.description: Open the video export dialog for the bookmarked camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export Video' dialog or panel is open within the Nx Witness VMS interface.

task_completion.description: Adjust the export duration to include a 10-second pre-buffer and 10-second post-buffer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export start and end times are adjusted to span a total of 30 seconds (10s bookmark + 10s pre-buffer + 10s post-buffer), visible in the export timeline selection or time input fields.

task_completion.description: Set the export file format to MKV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file format dropdown or selection in the export/save dialog is set to Matroska Video (.mkv).

task_completion.description: Set the export destination path to /home/ga/Documents/evidence_export.mkv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save destination is explicitly shown as '/home/ga/Documents/' and the filename is 'evidence_export.mkv' in the save dialog.
An export progress bar reaching 100%, an 'Export successful' notification in the VMS, or the file 'evidence_export.mkv' is visible in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory via a file manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness VMS GUI to perform the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Nx Witness desktop client interface rather than using terminal commands (like curl or ffmpeg) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The exported file was generated by the VMS, not created artificially.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows show commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/evidence_export.mkv' or 'cp' being used to fake the output file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window displays the characteristic Nx Witness UI, logo, and layout, rather than a generic video player or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target bookmark is named 'Staff Altercation' and has a duration of exactly 10 seconds (10000 ms). The task requires a 10-second buffer before and after the bookmark, meaning the total exported video duration must be 30 seconds. The required export format is Matroska (.mkv), and the exact expected output path is '/home/ga/Documents/evidence_export.mkv'.
